title: Drill
description: Metadata for a single drill generator. The actual generation logic lives in backend/app/drills/*.py -- this file is display/config metadata, not the generator itself.

id.description: Must match a Drill.id in backend/app/drills/registry.py

difficulty_notes.description: Human-readable explanation of what difficulty 0.0 vs 1.0 looks like for this drill

implemented.description: Whether backend/app/drills/*.py actually has a working generator for this yet

prerequisites.description: Other drill ids a learner should have some mastery of first (used for map ordering, not enforced)
